title: Iron-Air Batteries 10 Times Cheaper Than Li-Ion Will Start Mass Production in 2024 - autoevolution
description: Form Energy builds a West Virginia factory to produce its revolutionary iron-air battery, which is 10 times cheaper than current Li-ion cells
bodyText:
After his childhood dream of becoming a "tractor operator" didn't pan out, Cristian turned to journalism, first in print and later moving to online media. His top interests are electric vehicles and new energy solutions.			
			Full profile
